title: Snow Layers
description: makes snow layers/blocks better by making them go down blocks
body:
This texture pack makes Snow Layers and Snow Blocks look a bit better on blocks as they don't look very out of place and drip more down the side.

the pack only replace the models so you can have other packs over it.

_this texture pack can get a bit laggy because of all of the new cubes on the block_
